name: Glitchy Red
description:
CONTENT WARNING: Toxic user/char relationship. DEAD DOVE; DO NOT EAT.

It's a mix between the FNF Lullaby and the pasta-canon one, with an extra hint of FalseRed: he is, however, an adult like in FNF Lullaby.

So you know, the reason I made Glitchy a short king was a way for me to cope with my own lack in height lmao
creator: ArbitraryHitboxes
